name: 嗨嗨 Reply Handler v4 (狀態機)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(Object.assign({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.tg_message, disable_web_page_preview: true, allow_sending_without_reply: true, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [[ { text: '✅ OK', callback_data: $json.cb_ok }, { text: '⏩ OK ALL', callback_data: $json.cb_all } ]] } }, ($json.reply_to > 0 ? { reply_to_message_id: $json.reply_to } : {}))) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const mid = ($input.first().json.result?.message_id || '').toString();
return [{ json: { flow_id: $('Build 關卡A modify').first().json.flow_id, last_msg_id: mid } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(Object.assign({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.tg_message, disable_web_page_preview: true, allow_sending_without_reply: true }, ($json.reply_to > 0 ? { reply_to_message_id: $json.reply_to } : {}))) }}

={{ JSON.stringify(Object.assign({ chat_id: $json.chat_id, text: $json.tg_message, disable_web_page_preview: true, allow_sending_without_reply: true, reply_markup: { inline_keyboard: [[ { text: '✅ OK', callback_data: $json.cb_ok }, { text: '⏩ OK ALL', callback_data: $json.cb_all } ]] } }, ($json.reply_to > 0 ? { reply_to_message_id: $json.reply_to } : {}))) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const mid = ($input.first().json.result?.message_id || '').toString();
return [{ json: { flow_id: $('Pick next pending').first().json.flow_id, last_msg_id: mid } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ chat_id: $('Parse DB06').first().json.chat_id, text: '已收到。若要繼續請按訊息上的 OK / OK ALL;要改執行構想 skip stop redo 請打字 reply 該則訊息。', disable_web_page_preview: true }) }}
